Hello ,



Work slows down in small, often invisible ways.



Not because teams lack capability, but because too much time is spent
navigating emails, coordinating schedules, and piecing together information
across tools.
Over time, that friction adds up.



Google Workspace with Gemini helps reduce that friction by bringing AI
directly into the tools your team already uses.



*With Google Workspace, your team can:*

   - Quickly understand long email threads with AI-powered summaries
   - Draft responses with context and keep conversations moving
   - Organise ideas, analyse inputs, and create structured outputs faster
   - Let clients and partners book time directl
